title: Right Against Domestic Violence
summary: Women have the right to protection against physical, emotional, sexual, verbal, and economic abuse within a domestic relationship.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Domestic violence is not limited to physical harm. Mental harassment, financial control, and threats are also illegal.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: The law provides immediate protection, residence rights, and financial relief.

acts.name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act

exampleScenario.situation: A husband prevents his wife from working and controls all finances.
exampleScenario.explanation: Economic control is a form of domestic violence.
